ABOUT GO FOR IT, NAKAMURA-KUN!!
Love at first sight is no myth—just ask Okuto Nakamura. Whenever his dreamy classmate Aiki Hirose enters the room, his heart skips a beat, despite the fact that they’ve never actually spoken. Not to mention, Nakamura is a complete klutz with zero friends. Will he ruin his chance at love before it even begins?

author: Crunchyroll YouTube
text:
Ayanokoji vs The Acting Chairman | Classroom of the Elite Season 4
Ayanokoji gets help from Kiryuin to take on the acting chairman in episode 16! Watch Classroom of the Elite on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-cote4

ABOUT CLASSROOM OF THE ELITE
Kiyotaka Ayanokoji has just enrolled at Tokyo Koudo Ikusei Senior High School, where it's said that 100% of students go on to college or find employment. But he ends up in Class 1-D, which is full of all the school's problem children.

What's more, every month, the school awards students points with a cash value of 100,000 yen, and the classes employ a laissez-faire policy in which talking, sleeping, and even sabotage are permitted during class.

One month later, Ayanokoji, Horikita, and the students of Class D learn the truth of the system in place within their school...

author: Crunchyroll YouTube
text:
Saw His Search History But Was Kinda Into It | Rent-a-Girlfriend Season 5
Episode 8: Chizuru and Kazuya watch WeTube. Watch Rent-a-Girlfriend on Crunchyroll!: https://got.cr/cc-rag

ABOUT RENT-A-GIRLFRIEND
Kinoshita Kazuya is a 20-year-old failure of a college student. He managed to kiss his girlfriend once, but was dumped after a month. "Ugh... Damn it. I never want to go through that again."

Completely spiteful, Kazuya uses a certain method to date a girl. He goes to their meeting place and suddenly hears, "You're Kazuya-kun, right?" A beautiful girl brushing her long, black hair behind her ear was there, smiling at him. Her name was Mizuhara Chizuru. Something real is born after just a single rental! A reckless rom-com filled with love and excitement is about to begin!

text:
Shh | Witch Hat Atelier Animatic vs Final
Episode 7: Watch Witch Hat Atelier on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-wha

ABOUT WITCH HAT ATELIER
In a world where only witches can cast magic, they must avoid being seen by ordinary people while casting. While Coco does her chores, she daydreams of becoming a witch. When a young witch named Qifrey visits her village, Coco uncovers the “absolute secret,” becomes Qifrey’s apprentice, and begins her studies. This is the story of children who encounter despair, yet reach out toward hope.

text:
Remembering the Baddie He Fumbled | The Klutzy Class Monitor and the Girl with the Short Skirt
Kogori is in his feelings in episode 10! Watch The Klutzy Class Monitor and the Girl with the Short Skirt on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-tkcmatgwts

ABOUT THE KLUTZY CLASS MONITOR AND THE GIRL WITH THE SHORT SKIRT
Every morning, Sakuradaimon-kun enforces the rules at the school gate, stopping Poem-chan for her too-short skirt. But when they’re thrown together in remedial class, she discovers his secret—the serious, uptight Sakuradaimon-kun is hopeless at studying! As they clash, bicker, and stumble through school life together, the two opposites slowly draw closer and form an unexpected friendship.
